function.name: get_listing_details
function.description: Returns current listing metadata for a property: list price, sqft, bedrooms, bathrooms, year built, listing status (active / pending / sold / off-market), listing date, days on market, MLS ID.

address.description: Full property address (e.g., '123 Oak Street, Palo Alto, CA 94301').

function.name: get_comparable_sales
function.description: Returns recent comparable sales (comps) within a radius and time window. Used for valuation, listing-pricing, and appraisal support.

days_back.description: Look-back window in days for closed sales.

function.name: get_property_history
function.description: Returns the chronological transaction and listing history of a property — sales, listings, refinances, with prices and parties where available.

function.name: get_school_ratings
function.description: Returns school ratings for the assigned attendance-zone schools at a property address: elementary, middle, high, plus the district name and the ratings source (e.g., GreatSchools).

function.name: get_mortgage_rate
function.description: Returns current mortgage rates for a loan profile. Updated daily from market sources.

function.name: get_zoning_info
function.description: Returns current zoning information for an address: zone code, zone name, height limit, max density, ADU allowance, SB-9-style lot-split eligibility (CA-specific), HOA governance flag.

function.name: get_neighborhood_stats
function.description: Returns aggregate market statistics for a neighborhood radius around an address: median sale price, median price-per-sqft, median days on market, active inventory count, year-over-year appreciation, recent quarter trend.

address.description: Center-point property address for the neighborhood definition.

radius_mi.description: Radius in miles for neighborhood aggregation.

function.name: get_property_tax
function.description: Returns current property tax data: assessed value, effective tax rate, annual tax bill, assessment year, and any recent reassessment notes (e.g., transfer-triggered uplift, Prop-13-style cap notes).

function.name: get_rental_estimate
function.description: Returns rental valuation: estimated monthly rent, count of rental comps used, ZIP-level vacancy rate, gross-yield estimate (rent / list-price ratio).
